---
name: Weekly Submission
about: Submit weekly progress for the DevOps course project
title: "Week XX - Group XX Submission"
labels: submission
assignees: ""
---

## Week Number

Specify the week of the submission.

Example:
Week 03 – Article Search

---

## Group

Group number:

Example:
Group 02

---

## Topic

What is the topic of your project?

---

## Deliverable

Describe what you are submitting this week.

Examples:

- list of articles
- research question
- evidence table
- DevOps pipeline design

---

## Files

Provide links to the files in the repository.

Example:

/submissions/week03-article-search/group02-articles.md

---

## Comments

Optional comments about the progress of the project.
